_comment: Example operator profile for Maven (CMO Agent). Copy to operator.profile.json and edit, OR run `python scripts/setup_wizard.py` to generate it interactively. The live operator.profile.json is gitignored — never committed.
_maven_note: Maven uses brand_voice, primary_platform, posting_frequency, and target_audience to calibrate content strategy, ad copy, and publishing cadence. Fill these carefully — they are the CMO equivalent of north_star.
personal_brand: Your personal brand, creator handle, or DJ name (blank if none)
north_star: Your marketing north star + deadline (e.g., 10K followers + $1,500 MRR by 2027-Q1)
industry: agency | saas | ecommerce | services | content-creator | consulting | finance | other
primary_metric: MRR | Followers | Leads | ROAS | Revenue | etc.
daily_work: What you actually do day-to-day, in one sentence.
off_limits: Hard rules Maven must never violate (e.g., no autonomous posts, no paid spend without approval).
voice: Adjectives + samples + anti-patterns describing how you sound.
brand_voice: Maven-specific: how your brand communicates. E.g., 'introspective raw honest no-AI-slop' or 'energetic authoritative peer-to-peer'.
primary_platform: instagram | tiktok | youtube | linkedin | twitter | facebook
target_audience: Who you're building for. E.g., 'solo founders building with AI' or 'local service business owners'.
